resource.name: Ext: Accession Number
resource.description: Extension: Accession Number. The Accession Number of the ImagingStudy

resource.name: Ext: Administrative Parent Name
resource.description: Extension: The name of a person’s parent, recorded for administrative purposes as part of the person’s demographics (e.g to help with identification). This SHOULD NOT be confused with a parent whose details are recorded for contact purposes (Patient.contact) or as a family member (RelatedPerson). Most systems will use the “father’s name” field as the source of data for this extension. NOTE: This extension replaces the old ParentName extension and is the PREFFERED extension. Note: there SHOULD be only one parent marked as 'official'

resource.name: Ext: Allergy Intolerance End

resource.name: il-core-city-code
resource.description: Returns resources (e.g. Patient, Organization) where the CityCode extension within an address matches the specified code.

resource.name: il-core-encounter-paying-entity
resource.description: Returns Encounter instances where the Paying Entity extension matches the specified code.

resource.name: il-core-encounter-visitor-type
resource.description: Returns Encounter instances where the ILCore Encounter Visitor Type extension has a specified CodeableConcept value.

resource.name: il-core-imagingstudy-accession-number
resource.description: Returns ImagingStudy instances with an Accession Number extension matching the specified identifier.

resource.name: il-core-medication-course-of-therapy-type
resource.description: Returns MedicationStatement instances where the ILCore Medication Course-Of-Therapy Type extension has a specified CodeableConcept value.

resource.name: il-core-movement-sequence-number
resource.description: Returns Encounter instances where the ILCore Movement Sequence-Number extension has a specified string value.

resource.name: il-core-narcotic-medication
resource.description: Returns MedicationRequest, MedicationAdministration, or MedicationDispense instances where the ILCore Narcotic Medication extension has a specified boolean value.

resource.name: il-core-parent-name-given
resource.description: Returns resources (e.g. Patient, Practitioner, RelatedPerson) where the AdminParentName extension’s given name matches the specified value.

resource.name: il-core-patient-hmo
resource.description: Returns patients with an HMO extension matching the specified code.

resource.name: il-core-qualification-practice
resource.description: Returns Practitioner.qualification instances where the ILCore Qualification Practice extension has a specified CodeableConcept value.

resource.name: il-core-reaction-duration
resource.description: Returns AllergyIntolerance.reaction instances where the ILCore Reaction Duration extension has a specified Duration value.

resource.name: il-core-recorded-time
resource.description: Returns MedicationRequest, MedicationAdministration, or MedicationDispense instances where the ILCore Recorded Time extension has a specified dateTime value.

resource.name: il-core-specimen-processing-location
resource.description: Returns Specimen instances where the Processing Location extension has a specified reference.

resource.name: il-core-specimen-processing-practitioner
resource.description: Returns Specimen instances where the Processing Practitioner extension has a specified reference to ILCorePractitioner or ILCorePractitionerRole.

resource.name: il-core-statistical-area
resource.description: Returns instances containing an Address with the ILCore Statistical Area extension, specified as an Identifier value. This can be used to search across multiple profiles that contain the Address datatype.

resource.name: il-national-id
resource.description: Israeli Identifier number issued for all citizens and permanent residents. A nine-digit number including a check-digit

resource.name: il-prisoner-number
resource.description: Israel Prison Service prisoner number. A unique identifier for any prisoner currently serving a prison sentence

resource.description: קוד שירותים רפואיים , כולל שירותים באשפוז, שירותים אמבולטוריים, רפואת שיניים ובריאות הנפש

resource.name: קוד מוצר או שירות על פי משרד הבריאות
resource.description:
קוד שירותים רפואיים , כולל שירותים באשפוז, שירותים אמבולטוריים, רפואת שיניים ובריאות הנפש 
 Codes for medical services. Note that while this code system closely resembles CPT and includes a large number of CPT codes, there are some additional codes that are not covered by CPT and, more importantly, some cases where CPT codes are remapped and have different semantic meanings (e.g., code #28899 has two different meanings in CPT and in MoH codesytem). Therefore, despite apparent resemblance, this code system MUST NOT be treated as CPT.
